common.backendOffline: Backend API is offline. Start the backend on port 8000.

landing.heroTagline: The digital replica of your industrial complex
landing.heroIntro: GoharTwin connects plants, equipment, live data and engineering knowledge into one intelligent platform — from the mine to the steel plant. Every asset gets a digital passport, every question gets a knowledge-driven answer.
landing.capabilitiesSubtitle: Six pillars of the GoharTwin platform

digitalTwin.title: Digital Twin
digitalTwin.desc: A living digital replica of plants, areas and equipment with versioned asset passports.

industrialAi.title: Industrial AI
industrialAi.desc: An AI engineer that answers from the plant knowledge base — traceable, never invented.

knowledgeGraph.title: Knowledge Graph
knowledgeGraph.desc: Sites, plants, systems, equipment, tags and documents connected in one navigable graph.

predictiveMaintenance.title: Predictive Maintenance
predictiveMaintenance.desc: Condition monitoring, alarm insight and maintenance strategies per equipment.

digitalFactory.title: Digital Factory
digitalFactory.desc: From P&ID to 3D scenes: the whole factory browsable and clickable.

processIntelligence.title: Process Intelligence
processIntelligence.desc: Process data, KPIs and health indices turned into operational decisions.

sites.title: Industrial Sites
sites.subtitle: Select a company to enter its digital twin

site.plantsSubtitle: Select a plant to browse its areas and equipment
site.noPlants: No plants registered for this site yet.

plant.noEquipment: No equipment modelled in this plant yet. Passports will appear here as the knowledge base grows.

dashboard.title: Operations Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Live overview of the digital twin platform

equipment.notFound: Equipment not found or API offline.
equipment.historyNote: Sample timeline — will be fed by CMMS / historian integration.

h1.title: Vibration baseline recorded
h1.desc: Weekly vibration route completed; all points within ISO 10816-3 zone A.

h2.title: Bearing lubrication
h2.desc: DE/NDE bearings re-greased per standard quantity table.

h3.title: VFD parameter backup
h3.desc: Drive parameters exported and stored in the knowledge base.

h4.title: Annual inspection
h4.desc: Impeller and inlet damper inspected during shutdown; no findings.

knowledgeTab.title: Knowledge Links
knowledgeTab.desc: Documents and knowledge items related to this equipment.
knowledgeTab.empty: No knowledge items linked to this equipment yet.

equipment.aiScoped: AI assistant scoped to this equipment. Ask about specs, sensors or maintenance.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Center
knowledge.subtitle: Documents, drawings, standards and lessons learned of the industrial complex
knowledge.noItems: No items found in this category.

ai.title: AI Engineer
ai.subtitle: Knowledge-driven assistant for the industrial complex
ai.placeholder: Ask about equipment, e.g. "Tell me about FAN-11"...
ai.attachmentNote: Attachment preview — file upload will be enabled with the document store.
ai.emptyDesc: The AI Engineer answers only from the plant knowledge base. Try asking about FAN-11.
